steps.title: Identify the subject and verb structure
steps.content: The blank follows the clause 'In recent years more writers from Chad, including Lamko,' so it serves as the main verb of an independent clause whose subject is the plural noun phrase 'more writers from Chad, including Lamko'.

steps.title: Apply subject‑verb agreement
steps.content:
A plural subject requires a plural verb; 'have begun' is the only plural verb form among the options.
The other three choices use singular verb forms ('is beginning', 'has begun', 'begins'), which do not agree with the plural subject.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
